## Workflow stage

When should this template be used?

- [ ] Pre-task
- [ ] During-task
- [ ] Post-task
- [ ] Handoff

## Sensitive areas involved

Does this template touch on:

- [ ] Secrets (API keys, tokens, credentials)
- [ ] Full local paths
- [ ] Environment variables
- [ ] Git operations (push, tag, release, remote)
- [ ] Dependencies or package management
- [ ] Release or deployment
